name: UniRig Process Extension
author: DrHepa
description: Upstream-native UniRig process scaffold for Modly workflows.

params_schema.label: Seed
params_schema.tooltip: Deterministic seed forwarded to the runtime pipeline.

params_schema.label: Metadata Mode
params_schema.tooltip: Controls .rigmeta.json humanoid contract emission: auto falls back safely, legacy suppresses humanoid data, humanoid fails closed.

params_schema.label: Generation Profile
params_schema.tooltip: Selects the skeleton generation prior/config only. VRoid is experimental and does not alter humanoid trust or metadata mode semantics.
